scripts.clean:dev: rm -rf .next frontend/.next backend/.pycache backend/.pytest_cache tsconfig.tsbuildinfo frontend/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
scripts.dev: sh -c 'trap "kill 0" INT TERM EXIT; npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend & wait'
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir app --reload-dir prisma --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
